夜――。<br>自室で作業をしていると、扉が控え目にノックされた。:
It was night. The Commander was working in his private room when a
timid knock came at the door.
なんだ？ 今日も授業してほしいのか？: What's up? You want me to teach you again today?
うん……こっちの世界のこと、もっと知りたいから……: Yeah... I want to know more about this world...
夜遅くに、この世界についてヒマリに教示する。<br>それが最近の日課だった。:
Late at night, he taught Himari about this world. That had become
their daily routine.
異世界から来た自分が、早くみんなの役に立てるように――。<br>それは、最初の夜:
She came from another world and wanted to help everyone as soon as
possible—that's what Himari confided on the first night.
その健気さを知って、断れるはずもない。<br>だからいつものように、もちろんだ―:
Knowing how earnest she was, he couldn't refuse. So, as usual, he
beckoned her over to the desk with a simple 'Of course.'
小さな笑みを描いたヒマリは、<br>トテトテと小動物のような足取りで歩み寄ってく:
Himari, a small smile on her face, approached with a pitter-patter,
like a little animal.
……よし。もう遅いし、今日はそろそろ切り上げるか。<br>しかし勉強熱心だな、ヒ:
...All right. It's late, so let's call it a night. But you're so diligent,
Himari. You're really amazing.
そ、そんな……。<br>別に偉くなんてないよ……わたし……: Th-that's not... I'm not that amazing...
みんなの役に立ちたいって思ってるんだろ？<br>その姿勢が偉いって言ってるんだ。:
You want to be useful to everyone, don't you? I'm saying that
attitude is admirable.
もちろん、それもある……けど……: Of course, that's part of it... but...
いつも以上に歯切れ悪くしながら、俯いてしまうヒマリ。<br>艶のある黒髪から覗い:
Himari, even more hesitant than usual, looked down. Her ears, peeking
from her glossy black hair, were bright red.
ここに来るのは……その……<br>し、しれーかんと、少しでも一緒にいたい、から…:
I come here because... well... I want to be with you, Commaander, even
if just a little...
上目遣いでこちらを見詰める瞳は、涙で濡れていた。<br>必死に想いを伝えようとし:
Her eyes, looking up at him, were wet with tears. She was desperately
trying to convey her feelings—a gaze both fragile and passionate.
しばらく沈黙が続くが、<br>彼女の想いを察し、こちらから声を掛ける。:
A long silence stretched on, but sensing her feelings, he was the one
to speak.
えーと、それは……そういう意味か？<br>だとしたら、俺も嬉しいが――:
Uh, so that means... is that what you're saying? If so, I'm happy too,
but—
ヒマリは、ゆっくりと控えめに頷いた。<br>恥ずかしがり屋な彼女にこれ以上を求め:
Himari gave a slow, hesitant nod.
It would be cruel to ask for more from such a shy girl.
抱き締めると、ヒマリは華奢な身体をふるりと震わせた。しかし離しはしない。<br>:
He held her tight; her slender body trembled, but he didn't let go. As
if to praise her courage and convey his love, he hugged her warmly.
１人で何も知らない異世界に飛んで来た彼女――。<br>それがどんなに不安で心細い:
She had come to this unknown world all alone, knowing nothing... It
was impossible to imagine how anxious and lonely that must have been.
しれーかん……温かい……。こうやってギュッとされると安心する……。<br>好き…:
Commaander... you're so warm... When you hold me like this, I feel
safe... I... like you...
ありがとう……俺も、ヒマリが好きだ……: Thank you... I like you too, Himari...
囁くように言うと、ヒマリは安堵したように身体の硬直を解いた。<br>そして、ゆっ:
When he whispered that, Himari's tense body relaxed in relief.
Then, she slowly and gently hugged him back.
ヒマリも……好き……しれーかんのこと……大好き……: I like you too, Commaander... I really like you...
名残惜しさを感じながら身体を離すと、ヒマリは穏やかな微笑みを湛えていた。<br>:
Reluctantly, he pulled away, and Himari wore a gentle smile.
Then, as if by unspoken agreement, they brought their lips together—
